parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant CPO1
participant HUB
participant MSP1

activate CPO1
CPO1 -> HUB: HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1\nFROM: CPO1
activate HUB
HUB -> MSP1: HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1\nFROM: CPO1
activate MSP1
MSP1 -> HUB: HTTP: RESPONSE\nTO: CPO1\nFROM: MSP1
deactivate MSP1
HUB -> CPO1: HTTP: RESPONSE\nTO: CPO1\nFROM: MSP1
deactivate HUB
deactivate CPO1
@enduml
```
